title: Swoopbike Speedway
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:SwoopTrack.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The proposed Swoopbike Speedway]]

The '''Swoopbike Speedway''' was a proposed attraction located on the surface of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. The track featured grandstands capable of holding over one-hundred thousand beings, luxury boxes for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]] and [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]], floating [[Holocamera/Legends|holocameras]], [[food vendor]]s and a main seating area, where enlisted personnel sit. [[Swoop/Legends|Swoop bikes]] raced around the oval at high velocities.<ref name="DSD">''[[Death Star Designer]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Leland Chee]] has stated that, while most items, like the [[supercoaster]] and Ferris Wheel are entered for fun, much of the other information is included in the [[Holocron continuity database]], and is [[canon]]. Regarding the Swoopbike Speedway itself, Chee has also stated that its best to consider it non-canon until or unless it resurfaces elsewhere.<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1075#16045442|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-13|time=4:49 PM}}</ref>
